'''鈭歵h-dh-b''' ('''kathadhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dandyfy|dandyfy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dandyfy|dandyfy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kathadhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadhab|thithadhab]] || [[word:jithadhab|jithadhab]] || [[word:shithadhab|shithadhab]] || [[word:kithadhab|kithadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadhab|thuthuthadhab]] || [[word:jujuthadhab|jujuthadhab]] || [[word:shushuthadhab|shushuthadhab]] || [[word:kukuthadhab|kukuthadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadhab|thuthadhab]] || [[word:juthadhab|juthadhab]] || [[word:shuthadhab|shuthadhab]] || [[word:kuthadhab|kuthadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadhab|thuthadhab]] || [[word:juthadhab|juthadhab]] || [[word:shuthadhab|shuthadhab]] || [[word:kuthadhab|kuthadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadhab|thethadhab]] || [[word:jethadhab|jethadhab]] || [[word:shethadhab|shethadhab]] || [[word:kethadhab|kethadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadhab|thothothadhab]] || [[word:jojothadhab|jojothadhab]] || [[word:shoshothadhab|shoshothadhab]] || [[word:kokothadhab|kokothadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadhab|thothadhab]] || [[word:jothadhab|jothadhab]] || [[word:shothadhab|shothadhab]] || [[word:kothadhab|kothadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadhab|thothadhab]] || [[word:jothadhab|jothadhab]] || [[word:shothadhab|shothadhab]] || [[word:kothadhab|kothadhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]] || [[word:thadhab|thadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thadhab|th忙thadhab]] || [[word:j忙thadhab|j忙thadhab]] || [[word:sh忙thadhab|sh忙thadhab]] || [[word:k忙thadhab|k忙thadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadhab|thathathadhab]] || [[word:jajathadhab|jajathadhab]] || [[word:shashathadhab|shashathadhab]] || [[word:kakathadhab|kakathadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadhab|thathadhab]] || [[word:jathadhab|jathadhab]] || [[word:shathadhab|shathadhab]] || [[word:kathadhab|kathadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadhab|thathadhab]] || [[word:jathadhab|jathadhab]] || [[word:shathadhab|shathadhab]] || [[word:kathadhab|kathadhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathadhab|shathadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathadhab|goshathadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathadhab|gokishathadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathadhabn眉|shathadhabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkn眉|goshathadhabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhabn眉|gokishathadhabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathadhabsh毛|shathadhabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathadhabnksh毛|goshathadhabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathadhabsh毛|gokishathadhabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhabro|shathadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkro|goshathadhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhabro|gokishathadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhabmu|shathadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkmu|goshathadhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhabmu|gokishathadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathadhabsher|shathadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathadhabnksher|goshathadhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathadhabsher|gokishathadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathadhabng|shathadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkng|goshathadhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathadhabng|gokishathadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathadhabya|shathadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkya|goshathadhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathadhabya|gokishathadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathadhabyam|shathadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkyam|goshathadhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathadhabyam|gokishathadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhabn眉sh毛|shathadhabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkn眉sh毛|goshathadhabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhabn眉sh毛|gokishathadhabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhabn眉ro|shathadhabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkn眉ro|goshathadhabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhabn眉ro|gokishathadhabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhabn眉mu|shathadhabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkn眉mu|goshathadhabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhabn眉mu|gokishathadhabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhabsh毛n眉|shathadhabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhabnksh毛n眉|goshathadhabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhabsh毛n眉|gokishathadhabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhabsh毛ro|shathadhabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhabnksh毛ro|goshathadhabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhabsh毛ro|gokishathadhabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhabsh毛mu|shathadhabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhabnksh毛mu|goshathadhabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhabsh毛mu|gokishathadhabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhabron眉|shathadhabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkron眉|goshathadhabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhabron眉|gokishathadhabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhabrosh毛|shathadhabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkrosh毛|goshathadhabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhabrosh毛|gokishathadhabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhabromu|shathadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkromu|goshathadhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhabromu|gokishathadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhabmun眉|shathadhabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkmun眉|goshathadhabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhabmun眉|gokishathadhabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhabmush毛|shathadhabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkmush毛|goshathadhabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhabmush毛|gokishathadhabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhabmuro|shathadhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhabnkmuro|goshathadhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhabmuro|gokishathadhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
